questions.text: Have you worked with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)?

children.text: Have you built Docker images from scratch?
Have you optimized Docker images for production (multi-stage builds, layer caching)?
Have you deployed applications on Kubernetes?
Have you managed Kubernetes clusters in production?
Have you implemented auto-scaling and load balancing in Kubernetes?

questions.text: Have you developed REST APIs or web services?

children.text: Have you implemented authentication and authorization systems?
Have you worked with OAuth2 or JWT tokens?
Have you implemented single sign-on (SSO) solutions?
Have you optimized API performance and implemented caching?
Have you worked with Redis or Memcached?
Have you implemented distributed caching strategies?
Have you worked with React, Vue, or Angular?
Have you managed complex state in large applications?
Have you implemented state management with Redux, Vuex, or similar?
Have you implemented responsive and accessible UI designs?
Have you worked with CSS frameworks (Tailwind, Bootstrap)?
Have you created custom design systems or component libraries?

questions.text: Have you worked with databases (SQL or NoSQL)?

children.text: Have you designed database schemas?
Have you optimized database performance with indexing and query optimization?
Have you worked with database replication or sharding?
Have you worked with data pipelines or ETL processes?
Have you used Apache Spark, Airflow, or similar tools?
Have you built real-time streaming data pipelines?

questions.text: Have you worked with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)?

children.text: Have you implemented infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation)?
Have you managed multi-region or multi-cloud deployments?
Have you implemented disaster recovery and high availability strategies?
Have you worked with serverless architectures?
Have you built applications using Lambda, Functions, or similar?
Have you optimized serverless applications for cost and performance?

questions.text: Have you built or trained machine learning models?

children.text: Have you worked with deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)?
Have you designed custom neural network architectures?
Have you worked with transformers or large language models (LLMs)?
Have you fine-tuned or deployed LLMs in production?
Have you performed feature engineering and data preprocessing?
Have you worked with unstructured data (text, images, audio)?
Have you implemented computer vision or NLP solutions?
Have you deployed these models at scale?
Have you evaluated models using cross-validation and metrics?
Have you implemented A/B testing for ML models?
Have you built ML monitoring and observability systems?
Have you worked with Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI?
Have you implemented automated testing in CI/CD pipelines?
Have you implemented blue-green or canary deployments?

questions.text: Have you worked with microservices architecture?

children.text: Have you implemented service discovery and communication patterns?
Have you worked with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka)?
Have you implemented event-driven architectures?

questions.text: Have you performed security testing or implemented security best practices?

children.text: Have you conducted penetration testing or vulnerability assessments?
Have you implemented security scanning in CI/CD pipelines?
Have you built ML pipelines for training and deployment?
Have you implemented model versioning and experiment tracking?
Have you used tools like MLflow, Kubeflow, or SageMaker?
Have you implemented automated model retraining?
Have you built drift detection systems?
Have you implemented automated model rollback strategies?

questions.text: Have you mentored junior developers or led technical teams?

children.text: Have you conducted code reviews and established coding standards?
Have you architected systems or made key technical decisions?
